description: File upload with command injection via unsanitized filename in system() call

expected.notes: system() with string concatenation containing user-controlled filename
TP: $_FILES['file']['tmp_name'] (source at line 3) flows to move_uploaded_file at line 5; user-controlled tmp path used in file operation Exactly one finding after dedup.
TP: $_FILES['file']['name'] (source at line 2) flows through $target concatenation into system() chmod call at line 6; command injection via filename Exactly one finding after dedup.
